zh.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor verch Gwerystan於1020年出生在英國威爾斯時，她的父親Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent67歲，母親Nesta ferch Cadell66歲。她於大約1044年與Caradawg ap Gwyn在英國威爾斯波斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1069年在她的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor verch Gwerystan于1020年出生在英国威尔斯时，她的父亲Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent67岁，母亲Nesta ferch Cadell66岁。她于大约1044年与Caradawg ap Gwyn在英国威尔斯波斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1069年在她的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor verch Gwerystan was born in 1020, in Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, was 67 and her mother, Nesta ferch Cadell, was 66. She married Caradawg ap Gwyn about 1044, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1069, in her hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor verch Gwerystan est née en 1020, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Nesta ferch Cadell, avait 66 ans. Elle a épousé Caradawg ap Gwyn environ 1044, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1069, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor verch Gwerystan 1020 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent 67 und ihre Mutter Nesta ferch Cadell 66. Sie hat um 1044 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom Caradawg ap Gwyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1069 im Alter von 49 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor verch Gwerystan è nata il nel 1020 nel Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, aveva 67 anni e sua madre, Nesta ferch Cadell, aveva 66 anni. Lei sposato Caradawg ap Gwyn circa 1044, nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1069, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor verch Gwerystanが1020年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた時，父Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwentは67歳，母Nesta ferch Cadellは66歳であった。約1044年にイギリスウェールズポウイスでCaradawg ap Gwynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1069年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor verch Gwerystan(이)가 1020년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent(은)는 67세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nesta ferch Cadell(은)는 66세였다. 그녀는 대략 1044년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 Caradawg ap Gwyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1069년 그녀의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor verch Gwerystan nasceu em 1020, em Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Nesta ferch Cadell, tinha 66 anos. Ela casou-se com Caradawg ap Gwyn aproximadamente 1044, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1069, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor verch Gwerystan родилась в 1020 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Nesta ferch Cadell, 66. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Caradawg ap Gwyn около 1044 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1069 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor verch Gwerystan nació en 1020, en Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Nesta ferch Cadell, tenía 66 años. Se casó con Caradawg ap Gwyn aproximadamente 1044, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1069, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
